abstract.text: Process a single ARGB32 frame through the SDK pipeline.
On-device face recognition with fused liveness and TrueDepth anti-spoofing.

Get the current tracker as an in-memory blob.
Real still-image identity match against a reference bank.
Learn/improve the current face template (optional helper).
